case_title: TROY JOHNSON VS. RAJ SAMRAT CHAUDHURI et al

docket_entries.description: ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR OCT-23-2012 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 2:00 PM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). THE SEP-12-2012 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR OCT-23-2012 CONTINUED TO JAN-29-2013 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610 FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). THE OCT-23-2012 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
NOTICE OF CHANGE OF ADDRESS FILED BY PRO PER JOHNSON, TROY
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF JAN-29-2013 IS OFF CALENDAR. DISMISSAL ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF JOHNSON, TROY AS TO DEFENDANT CHAUDHURI, RAJ SAMRAT ENTERPRISE RENT A CAR COMPANY OF SAN FRANCISCO, LLC DOES 1 TO 20 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR SEP-12-2012 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  JUN-11-2012 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         AUG-28-2012

DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITH PREJUDICE
